newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Latest substantive prints (record Q1 NT$11.8B +73% YoY driven by AI server power test + SLT, CPO test pilot for the 4th insertion in June) were already disclosed at the April 30 Q1 call. The -5.2% drift since June 9 carries no new information.

sources.label: Chroma ATE Q1 2026 earnings call summary (BigGo)

verdicts.rankRationale: No new news since June 9; AI power-test/SLT/CPO-test story (Q1 record) already known and unanimous Strong Buy coverage keeps eroding the 'underfollowed' residual-alpha premise on this crowding-sensitive page. ~185% YTD leaves little hidden asymmetry. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Direct AI-server power test + SLT + CPO test pilot; choke-point test equipment with NVDA/AMD/GOOG adoption.
verdicts.neutral: Execution is real but fully consensus; residual alpha thin after a triple.
verdicts.bear: 185% YTD and unanimous coverage; no longer underfollowed, vulnerable to any AI-capex test slowdown.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded ownership / coverage saturation erodes hidden-alpha thesis.
